questions.q: A recent incident in London highlighted a new form of extortion involving what type of wearable technology being used to secretly record people?
In May 2026, internet infrastructure company Cloudflare announced it was laying off approximately how many employees?
In May 2026, the Canadian government announced oversight reforms to which body to combat immigration and citizenship scams?
options: College of Immigration and Citizenship Consultants
Immigration and Refugee Board of Canada
questions.correctText: College of Immigration and Citizenship Consultants

questions.q: A U.S. industry body reported in May 2026 that Canada's provincial bans on American alcohol led to what percentage drop in U.S. alcohol exports to Canada?
Starting May 8, 2026, the U.S. State Department announced it will proactively start revoking passports for thousands of parents who owe significant amounts of what?
In May 2026, a federal judge ruled that the termination of humanities grants by which government entity was unconstitutional and 'troubling'?
During finals week in May 2026, which popular educational platform was hacked by the group ShinyHunters, leaving university students stranded?
New images published on May 8, 2026, revealed that approximately how many North Korean soldiers have died fighting in the Russia-Ukraine war?
Following a second round of attacks on U.S. Navy destroyers in the Strait of Hormuz reported on May 8, 2026, how did President Donald Trump describe the U.S. retaliatory bombing of Iran?
Which group of tech workers rejected a $340,000 one-time bonus on May 8, 2026, risking an 18-day strike as they demand annual payouts and a share of the company's AI windfall?
